name: Point-Set Topology — Part 2: Continuity & Compactness
description: Continuity, homeomorphisms, compactness, and key theorems. Depends on Part 1 (axioms & definitions).
mermaid:
graph TD
    DefCont["Def: f continuous iff preimage of open is open"]
    DefContClosed["Def: f continuous iff preimage of closed is closed"]
    DefHomeo["Def: Homeomorphism"]
    ThmContEquiv["Thm: Open and closed char. of continuity equivalent"]
    ThmCompose["Thm: Composition of continuous is continuous"]
    DefCompact["Def: Compact: every open cover has finite subcover"]
    DefSeqCompact["Def: Sequentially compact"]
    ThmCompactSeq["Thm: In metric space, compact ⇔ sequentially compact"]
    ThmContCompact["Thm: Continuous image of compact is compact"]
    RefHausdorff["Hausdorff (Part 3)"]
    ThmCompactClosed["Thm: Compact subset of Hausdorff is closed"]
    CorClosedCompact["Cor: Closed subset of compact is compact"]
    ThmHeineBorel["Thm: Heine-Borel: compact in R^n ⇔ closed and bounded"]
    LemProdCompact["Lem: Finite product of compact is compact"]
    ThmExtreme["Thm: Continuous f: K→R, K compact, attains max and min"]
    RefOpen["Open set (Part 1)"]
    RefClosed["Closed set (Part 1)"]
    RefOpen --> DefCont
    RefClosed --> DefContClosed
    DefCont --> ThmContEquiv
    DefContClosed --> ThmContEquiv
    DefCont --> DefHomeo
    DefCont --> ThmCompose
    DefCompact --> ThmContCompact
    RefHausdorff --> ThmCompactClosed
    DefCompact --> ThmCompactClosed
    DefCompact --> CorClosedCompact
    DefCompact --> LemProdCompact
    ThmCompactClosed --> CorClosedCompact
    DefCompact --> ThmHeineBorel
    ThmContCompact --> ThmExtreme
    DefSeqCompact --> ThmCompactSeq
    DefCompact --> ThmCompactSeq
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef lemma fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff,stroke:#4dabf7
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    classDef corollary fill:#1abc9c,color:#fff,stroke:#16a085
    classDef ref fill:#bdc3c7,color:#333,stroke:#95a5a6
    class RefOpen,RefClosed,RefHausdorff ref
    class DefCont,DefContClosed,DefHomeo,DefCompact,DefSeqCompact definition
    class LemProdCompact lemma
    class ThmContEquiv,ThmCompose,ThmCompactSeq,ThmContCompact,ThmCompactClosed,ThmHeineBorel,ThmExtreme theorem
    class CorClosedCompact corollary
